title: Couscous with Midnightly Roast Chicken
description: A flavorful and nutritious dish combining couscous with a delicious midnightly roasted chicken.
instructions: Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Rub the mixture all over the chicken breast.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the chicken breast on both sides until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the chicken for 20-25 minutes or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken is roasting, prepare the couscous according to package instructions.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Fluff the cooked couscous with a fork and toss it with lemon juice.
Serve the sliced chicken on top of the couscous.
